Notes: Some bleaching on Porites lobata tips. Rubble field stable. Post-2022 regrowth visible on older substrate.
Montipora capitata dominant. Patchy bleaching on colony edges. CCA crust expanding on cleared rubble.
Best cover on this site. Low bleaching. New recruits of Pocillopora meandrina noted on carbonate rubble.
Fore-reef shows strong recovery. No active bleaching. DHW has dropped since August. Good visibility 12m.
Highest coral cover recorded on this transect since 2021 surveys. Dense Pocillopora colonies structurally complex.
Pavona varians forming plate-like structures at depth. No bleaching. CCA in good condition. Moderate surge.
Fringing reef with high macroalgae pressure. Bleaching on Montipora capitata tips. Turbidity elevated near channel.
Highest bleaching incidence on all October transects. Macroalgae competitive pressure high. Terrestrial runoff suspected.
Mid-channel fringing shows moderate recovery. Porites lobata mounding colonies surviving but stunted growth form.
Coconut Island south shows good recovery. Recruit density high on lower transect. CCA 14% highest on dataset.
Mixed assemblage. Pocillopora dominant. Some Montipora capitata encrusting. Minor bleaching on 2 colonies.
Moderate macroalgae. Montipora capitata encrusting forms active. Rubble stabilizing with crustose coverage.
South barrier reef shows strong structural recovery. No bleaching. Swell energy higher. Deeper carbonate framework.
Pavona varians dominant at depth. Dense coral cover. High fish diversity noted. No bleaching observed.
Deepest transect on dataset. Excellent visibility 15m. Low macroalgae. Strong recovery since 2022 bleaching event.
